Originally gave it 4 stars.

Changed it to 5 after I searched for "Morgenstern" to get an idea about what's in the original version.

S. Morgenstern. Simon "S." Morgenstern is the fictional author of The Princess Bride, and a native of the fictional country of Florin. Author William Goldman presents the novel as being an abridged version of Morgenstern's original tale by himself.

Well played, William Goldman.
